calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Vacated

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT GREGORY KELLY DBA BEAUTIFUL HOMES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, first cause of action San Francisco Rent Ordinance tenant re harrrassment; ordinance on it's face is sufficient re contractor. Sustained with leave to amend as to second, third and fourth causes of action, to set forth specific facts showing agency and or conspiracy. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Continued To Sep-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES.
RULING: THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT GREGORY KELLY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to September 14, 2012 at 9:30am in Department 501, the housing court. As required by Local Rule 2.6C, moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than September 5, 2012 at 4:00pm with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
